data.raceName: THE CHAD E. CARLTON CONSOLATION TROT MS
data.raceComments: {"comment":"7. UNHYNGED CADEAU has raced two times this prep and has filled a minor placing on each occasion. Went well again last time over 1609m at this track, finishing third and 21 metres from the winner. Interesting to see what unfolds from this wide draw. Good enough to win a race of this calibre. 1. DEJA FROU finished seventh last start over 1609m at this track, beaten 90 metres, after finishing fourth at this track the run prior. Will enjoy a nice run from this favourable starting position. Primary contender if he is at his best. 6. ONE MIKE OUT is in the mix following a fifth at his most recent appearance over 1609m at this track. 2. I 'TOO VOLO must be considered after he finished third over 1609m at this track two weeks ago.","runners":[7,1,6,2],"exclusive":false}
